input.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation, and YTD performance. Please provide a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbols, number of shares, current market price, and total market value. Calculate daily profit and loss in both absolute dollars and percentage terms based on the previous close. Generate a sector allocation breakdown showing specific percentage values for each sector. Additionally, provide year-to-date performance metrics, including the total return percentage and the portfolio value at the start of the year compared to the current value.

ui_planner_output.title: Equity Portfolio Overview
ui_planner_output.subtitle: Comprehensive view of portfolio performance, sector allocation, and detailed holdings with daily P&L

blocks.title: Portfolio Performance Summary

dataContract.description: Current portfolio NAV, daily return percentage, and YTD return percentage

blocks.sub_question: What is the current Net Asset Value (NAV), daily return percentage, and year-to-date (YTD) return percentage of the portfolio?

blocks.title: Sector Allocation Breakdown

dataContract.description: Percentage breakdown of portfolio market value by economic sector

blocks.sub_question: What is the percentage allocation of the portfolio's total market value across different sectors?

blocks.title: Holdings and Daily P&L

dataContract.description: Detailed list of holdings with ticker, shares, price, market value, daily P&L ($), and daily P&L (%)

blocks.sub_question: What are the ticker symbols, number of shares, current market price, total market value, daily profit and loss in dollars, and daily profit and loss percentage for each holding in the portfolio?

metadata.question: Show me my equity portfolio with holdings, daily P&L, sector allocation, and YTD performance. Please provide a detailed table of holdings including ticker symbols, number of shares, current market price, and total market value. Calculate daily profit and loss in both absolute dollars and percentage terms based on the previous close. Generate a sector allocation breakdown showing specific percentage values for each sector. Additionally, provide year-to-date performance metrics, including the total return percentage and the portfolio value at the start of the year compared to the current value.
